headline_findings: ZERO bespoke Apex classes. All 396 ApexClass records belong to packages: 390 'pi' (Pardot/Account Engagement), 6 'HubSpot_Inc' (HubSpot Salesforce Connector).
ZERO bespoke Apex triggers. All 5 ApexTrigger records are from the 'pi' (Pardot) namespace.
*** HUBSPOT INTEGRATION DETECTED via Apex classes — Brayden did not flag this. There is a HubSpot Salesforce connector installed pushing data between systems. ***
All bespoke automation lives in Flows (already documented in 02-flows-metadata-parsed.md). Migration scope is therefore well-bounded.
Only 2 Validation Rules and 2 Workflow Rules — minimal classic automation.

apex_triggers.name: CampaignDeleteCheck
apex_triggers.purpose: Pardot package: prevents deletion of campaigns synced to Pardot

apex_triggers.name: (name redacted in tool output - likely PardotTaskTrigger or similar)
apex_triggers.purpose: Pardot package: handles Pardot-generated task records

apex_triggers.name: LogAccountChange
apex_triggers.purpose: Pardot sync: pushes Account changes to Pardot

apex_triggers.name: LogContactChange
apex_triggers.purpose: Pardot sync: pushes Contact changes to Pardot

apex_triggers.name: LogLeadChange
apex_triggers.purpose: Pardot sync: pushes Lead changes to Pardot

validation_rules.name: Only_Numbers_In_Extension
validation_rules.error_message: Phone extension must contain numbers only.

validation_rules.name: Only_Numbers_In_Extension
validation_rules.error_message: Phone extension must contain numbers only.

workflow_rules.name: Copy Billing Address to Shipping Address
workflow_rules.purpose: Mirrors billing address to shipping address. Standard SF default.
workflow_rules.rebuild_complexity: trivial - either copy in form save handler, OR drop the shipping address field entirely if not used

workflow_rules.name: Task Reminder
workflow_rules.purpose: Standard SF default task reminder workflow
workflow_rules.rebuild_complexity: trivial - reminder field on tasks table, app-level notification

implications_for_migration: Migration code-complexity is LOW: no bespoke Apex to rewrite.
All custom logic is in 7 bespoke Flows (already documented). Estimated rebuild: ~2-4 weeks of Postgres triggers/scheduled jobs/app code.

The HubSpot sync is doing real work — assume HubSpot is the source-of-truth for marketing data and SF was the downstream sales-of-truth. The new CRM needs to decide: keep HubSpot sync going, replace with direct API integration, or have Postgres pull from HubSpot directly.

The Pardot/Account Engagement integration is also active and complex (390 classes, 5 triggers). If Pardot is being kept post-SF-sunset, it needs a new sync target. If not, plan its retirement separately.
Workflow rules are trivial defaults — drop them or implement as a 1-line copy in the form layer.
